scripts.publish:filigran-chatbot: yarn build:filigran-chatbot && yarn workspace @filigran/chatbot npm publish --provenance --access public
scripts.publish:filigran-icon: yarn build:filigran-icon && yarn workspace @filigran/icon npm publish --provenance --access public
scripts.publish:filigran-ui: yarn build:filigran-icon && yarn build:filigran-ui && yarn workspace @filigran/ui npm publish --provenance --access public
scripts.release:filigran-chatbot: yarn build:filigran-chatbot && yarn workspace @filigran/chatbot npm publish --access public
scripts.release:filigran-icon: yarn build:filigran-icon && yarn workspace @filigran/icon npm publish --access public
scripts.release:filigran-ui: yarn build:filigran-icon && yarn build:filigran-ui && yarn workspace @filigran/ui npm publish --access public
